channel.title: Forex Playbook on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Forex Playbook on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio

item.title: Setup: The HVN Rush — Rank A
item.description: A precision news-driven setup using High Volume Nodes and halfback levels from the catalyst period as entry triggers.

item.title: Setup: The Profile Switch — Rank SSS
item.description: The highest-conviction forex setup. A profile transition at key session boundaries that confirms continuation after an extended single-print move into or past a reference area.
